Cookie Policy

The Organization LLC — Effective March 14, 2026

What Are Cookies

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better experience by remembering your preferences and maintaining your session.

Cookies We Use

CookieTypePurposeDuration
session_tokenEssentialAuthentication & login sessionSession
sb-access-tokenEssentialSupabase authentication1 hour
sb-refresh-tokenEssentialSession refresh7 days
user_preferencesFunctionalTheme, language, layout settings1 year

What We Do NOT Use

  • Third-party advertising cookies
  • Cross-site tracking pixels
  • Social media tracking cookies
  • Analytics cookies that share data with third parties

Managing Cookies

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may prevent you from logging into your account. Here are links to manage cookies in popular browsers:

  • Google Chrome
  • Firefox
  • Safari
  • Microsoft Edge

Contact

  • Phone: (305) 988-9666
  • Email: privacy@ziarem.com
